items.raw_excerpt: From swimming in the Seine to visiting a bridge-turned artwork, via fireworks and music, here's a look at what's on in summer 2026 in Paris.

items.raw_excerpt: In einer kleinen Gemeinde muss nicht alles andere auch klein sein. Das beweist die Firma Trachsel Holzbau GmbH aus Landiswil: In ihren BetriebsrГӨumen steht eine der schweizweit produktivsten CNC-Maschinen. Thomas Trachsel erzГӨhlt, was sie kann. Und warum er mit seiner Firma Landiswil treu bleibt.

items.raw_excerpt: Swiss lawmakers have voted to overturn a short-lived rule on using a bag when weighing fresh produce in supermarkets, but the change might not be implemented immediately nor in all stores.

items.raw_excerpt: зҹіе·қзңҢйҮ‘жІўеёӮгҒ®з№ҒиҸҜиЎ—гғ»зүҮз”әгҒ«зҸҫд»ЈзүҲеұӢеҸ°жқ‘гҖҢгҒЁгҒҠгӮҠгӮғгӮ“гҒӣ KANAZAWA FOODLABOгҖҚгҒҢгҖҒ2018е№ҙ12жңҲ13ж—ҘпјҲжңЁпјүгҒ«гӮӘгғјгғ—гғігҒҷгӮӢгҖӮгҖҺе®ҹйЁ“гҖҸгӮ’гӮігғігӮ»гғ—гғҲгҒ«гҖҒй–ӢжҘӯжҷӮгҒҜ8еә—иҲ—гҒ§гӮ№гӮҝгғјгғҲгҖӮжө·иҖҒе°Ӯй–Җеә—гӮ„зҮ»иЈҪгғҗгғјгҖҒдёӯиҸҜгҒ«гҒҠгҒ°гӮ“гҒ–гҒ„гҒӘгҒ©вҖңйҮ‘жІўгӮүгҒ—гҒ•вҖқгӮ’еҸ–гӮҠе…ҘгӮҢгҒҹеӨҡеҪ©гҒӘйЈІйЈҹеә—иҲ—гҒҢгғ©гӮӨгғігғҠгғғгғ—гҒ—гҖҒж”Ҝжү•гҒ„гҒҜгӮӯгғЈгғғгӮ·гғҘгғ¬гӮ№жұәжёҲгӮ’жҺЎз”ЁгҒҷгӮӢгҒӘгҒ©гҖҒе…ҲйҖІзҡ„гҒӘеұӢеҸ°жқ‘гҒЁгҒ—гҒҰиӘ•з”ҹгҒҷгӮӢгҖӮ
items.summary_en: A modern food stall village called TЕҚryanse KANAZAWA FOODLABO will open in Katamachi, Kanazawa, on December 13, 2018. It will start with eight small food shops, including shrimp, smoked food, Chinese food, and local-style dishes. The site will also use cashless payments.

items.raw_excerpt: In Ramasseri near Palakkad, a small group of families continues a long-standing idli-making practice that still draws visitors each morning.
items.summary_en: In Ramasseri near Palakkad, a few families still make idli in a very old local way. Food lovers visit the village each morning to taste it and see the tradition continue.

items.raw_excerpt: Det sjeldne funnet som ble gjort av en tutulus pГғВҘ et jorde i Dovre for ni ГғВҘr siden, blir nГғВҘ innlemmet i den permanente utstillingen Liv laga, som ГғВҘpnet i sommer.
items.summary_en: A rare bronze tutulus found in a field in Dovre nine years ago will become part of the permanent Liv laga exhibition. The exhibition opened this summer at the Museum of Cultural History.
